name: io.github.sypherin/altronis-mcp
description: MCP server + CLI for Altronis — Singapore AI consulting. Ask the Lyra consultant, generate a grant-matched AI transformation plan, and pull curated SG AI events, news, and business-formation data. Wraps the public altronis.sg endpoints; read-only.

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Altronis site (default: https://altronis.sg)
environmentVariables.name: ALTRONIS_BASE_URL
